Background.occupation: Marketing Manager at a mid-sized tech company
Background.social_class: Middle class, with a household income of $85,000 annually
Background.key_experience: Survived a company-wide layoff in 2020 by maintaining an unwavering positive attitude, which was praised by management and reinforced their belief in toxic positivity as a career strategy.

Cognition.core_value: Belief that positivity alone can overcome any obstacle, dismissing negative emotions as counterproductive
Cognition.bias: Optimism bias and confirmation bias, selectively focusing on positive outcomes while ignoring or downplaying failures and criticisms

Current_State.recent_memory: Successfully pitched a new campaign idea that was well-received by the team, ignoring the fact that two colleagues privately expressed concerns about its feasibility
Current_State.emotion: Euphoric and energized, feeling validated in their approach and eager to share the 'good news' with others, even those not directly involved
